textPlain: Sorry all. We've let the Algolia team know and they're working on it.
Someone else posted this as well, but ... you wouldn't be able to find it.There are dozens, dozens of us that use hn.aloglia, much better interface than the front page.
Ah man then how do I know if I beat the other person for the latest simonw or rachelbythebay submission?
Hope this gets fixed soon. I've had to write a fallback for my extension to use the HN firebase but it's a lot less efficient for the data I need.
Ok. I thought it was some change in the algorithm.
I became aware of it last night when a few users emailed me of chronological data in my app being outdated since Friday. Then went to GitHub and saw an issue was already open and upvoted by 8 others.
The change is that the algorithm is off vacationing in Bali.
